# Dynamic Stylz Salon

> Full-service family hair salon at 313 W Main St, Elma, WA 98541. Cuts, color, balayage, highlights, perms, kids' haircuts, and sensory-friendly appointments. Owned and operated by Amber Studer, master stylist with 15+ years behind the chair. Serving Elma, Montesano, McCleary, Aberdeen, Hoquiam, Satsop, Oakville, Malone, and Porter — the greater Grays Harbor County, Washington area — since 2009.

Phone: (360) 581-2428
Address: 313 W Main St, Elma, WA 98541
Hours: Monday–Thursday 10am–6pm, Friday 10am–5pm, Saturday–Sunday closed.

## Services

- [Women's Cut & Style](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Consultation, shampoo, precision cut, and blow-dry style. From $45.
- [Men's Cut](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Classic or modern cut with wash and style. $25.
- [Kids' Cut](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Friendly, patient cuts for children. $20. First-time haircuts are a specialty.
- [Single-Process Color](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): All-over color to refresh your base, cover grays, or shift your shade. From $85.
- [Highlights & Balayage](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Hand-painted or foiled dimensional color. Priced by consultation.
- [Perms](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Classic perms for lasting texture and body. From $75.
- [Wash & Style](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Shampoo, condition, and professional blow-dry. $30.
- [Updo / Special Occasion](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Wedding, prom, and event styling. Priced by consultation.

## Stylists

- [Amber Studer](https://dynamicstylz.com/#team): Owner and master stylist. 15+ years behind the chair. Specializes in lived-in balayage, dimensional color, and precision cuts.

## Service Area

Elma, Montesano, McCleary, Aberdeen, Hoquiam, Satsop, Oakville, Malone, and Porter — all located in Grays Harbor County, Washington.

## Accommodations

- Sensory-friendly appointments available by request — dimmed lights, no music, slower pacing. Welcome for kids and adults.
- Walk-ins welcome when a chair is open; appointments strongly recommended for color, balayage, and perms.
- Kid-friendly environment.
- Payment: cash, debit, and all major credit cards accepted.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- [Where is Dynamic Stylz Salon located?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) 313 W Main St in downtown Elma, WA — third door from Dollar Tree, with free alley parking behind the building.
- [How do I book an appointment?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Call or text (360) 581-2428, or message the Facebook page.
- [Do you do balayage?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Yes — Amber specializes in hand-painted balayage and dimensional color. Free consultation.
- [Do you cut kids' hair?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Yes — kids' cuts are $20. First-time haircuts are a specialty.
- [Do you offer sensory-friendly appointments?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Yes. Mention it when booking.
